name: todoapp
description:
ToDoApp

A clean, minimal to-do app to manage tasks and track progress while staying organized.

Tech Stack:

  1. Backend : NodeJs
  2. Frontend : Vite + React
  3. Database : FireBase + NoSQL

Intended Features:

  • Add remove edit and filter tasks intuitively
  • Save data per user in backend based on login/signup
  • Securing data so it cannot be leaked
